title: Breathe Out the Storm
lesson: When big angry feelings come, taking slow deep breaths helps you feel calm again.
prompts: In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with a happy, focused expression, stacking colourful building blocks into a tall tower. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with an angry, frustrated expression, fists clenched, as the colourful block tower tumbles down around them. Scattered blocks on the floor. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits in the mid-ground, arms crossed tightly and shoulders tense, with an upset expression. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels close, one hand on their own belly, calmly showing how to take a deep breath. Make the interaction read physically: the man leans toward the upset child with a hand on his own belly, and the child turns their gaze toward the man's breathing. Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with eyes gently closed and one hand on their chest taking a slow deep breath, the angry frown softening. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} breathes along encouragingly. Make the interaction read physically: the child and the man sit facing each other, each with a hand on their own chest, breathing slowly together. Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with both hands resting loosely in their lap, with a calm, relieved little smile, shoulders relaxed, the storm of feelings passed. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} sits close with one hand gently raised in encouragement, smiling warmly. Make the interaction read physically: the man turns toward the calmed child with one hand raised gently while the child looks back toward the man, relieved. Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a bright playroom in the afternoon, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits calmly rebuilding the block tower, with a peaceful, happy smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} helps place a block, smiling proudly. Make the interaction read physically: the child's and the man's hands both add blocks to the one tower they are rebuilding, both gazes on that tower. Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a bright afternoon playroom, the child sits alone happily stacking colourful blocks into a tall tower, focused.
In the playroom, the child sits alone, angry and frustrated with fists clenched, as the block tower tumbles down around them.
In the playroom, the child sits with arms crossed tightly, upset, while the father kneels close with a hand on his own belly, showing how to take a deep breath.
In the playroom, the child sits with eyes gently closed and a hand on their chest taking a slow deep breath, the angry frown softening, while the father breathes along.
In the playroom, the child sits alone with hands resting loosely in their lap, a calm relieved little smile and relaxed shoulders — the angry storm has passed.
In the playroom, the child calmly rebuilds the block tower with a peaceful smile while the father helps place a block, proud — deep breaths chased the storm away.
texts: In the playroom, {NAME} stacked the blocks into a tall, wobbly tower. "Higher and higher!" said {NAME}, reaching up.
Then it all tumbled down. {NAME} felt SO angry, with two fists clenched tight. "Grrr!" cried {NAME}.
Dad knelt down close to {NAME}. "Let's take a deep breath together," he said, his hand on his belly. "In, and out."
{NAME} closed both eyes and breathed in slow... and out. "In... and out," said {NAME}. The angry storm began to fade away.
Soon {NAME} felt calm again, shoulders soft and a little smile peeking out. "I feel better now," said {NAME}.
Feeling better, {NAME} built the tower again — this time with Dad. "Deep breaths chase the storm away," said {NAME}.
